title: 5 Best Buttondown Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Buttondown alternatives. Compare ConvertKit, Beehiiv, MailerLite, and more.
intro: While Buttondown excels for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, it may not meet everyone's needs. Whether you're looking for more advanced automation, better monetization features, or a drag-and-drop editor, there are several excellent alternatives that offer unique strengths for different use cases.
why_switch: Need visual automation builders and advanced segmentation beyond Buttondown's capabilities
Want built-in landing pages, pop-ups, or e-commerce features for a complete marketing solution
Seeking newsletter monetization options or affiliate programs that Buttondown doesn't offer

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit offers generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers and visual automation workflows specifically designed for content creators. It includes built-in landing pages and commerce features, making it ideal if you want to sell digital products or courses alongside your newsletter.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out with a 2,500 subscriber free tier and built-in monetization features including ads network and referral programs. If you want to generate revenue directly from your newsletter, Beehiiv's growth-focused tools are purpose-built for that goal.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite matches Buttondown's $9 entry price while offering a drag-and-drop editor, 1,000 free subscribers, and additional features like pop-ups and surveys. It's the best value option if you want more functionality without stepping up to enterprise pricing.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and site tracking capabilities at a comparable price point. Choose this if you need sophisticated automation workflows and want to manage customer relationships beyond just email.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an exceptional free tier with 100,000 subscribers and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. If you need multi-channel marketing capabilities or high-volume transactional emails, Brevo's generous free plan is hard to beat.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Buttondown?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and includes multi-channel features beyond email like SMS and live chat. If you want a more newsletter-focused experience with fewer subscribers, Beehiiv's free plan accommodates up to 2,500 subscribers with built-in monetization options.

faq.q: What is the best Buttondown alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses, matching Buttondown's $9 starting price while offering drag-and-drop editor, 1,000 free subscribers, and features like landing pages and pop-ups. For businesses that want CRM functionality included, ActiveCampaign provides advanced automation and customer relationship tools at a competitive price.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes—Brevo and MailerLite both start at free and have paid plans around the same price ($9-25/month), while offering more features than Buttondown. For the absolute lowest entry cost with generous subscriber limits, Brevo's free plan with 100,000 subscribers is unmatched in the industry.
